# God is a TJ

## Description
A text jockey (TJ) that endlessly samples the King James Bible line by line and
mixes it into a never-ending stream of colour-cycling text in the browser. The
concept was made up by ax710 somewhere in the 1990s; this web implementation was
an idea by y-a-v-a.

## Creators
- ax710 (https://www.ax710.org/)
- y-a-v-a.org (https://www.y-a-v-a.org/) also known as Vincent Bruijn

## Date
2010

## License
Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Netherlands
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/nl/

## Based On
"The King James Bible", Project Gutenberg eBook #10
https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/10

## Related
"Neuropolis N", the same text jockey sampling a collection of collected texts
https://www.neuropolisn.com/

## Attribution Required
When referencing this work, please credit ax710 & y-a-v-a.org and include the
Creative Commons license.
